item.title: Samsung Music [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Samsung Music [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ayrahikari
item.itunes:summary:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services
[read more]
item.description:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Samsung Music
(Audioplayers)
Samsung Music Port for Non-Samsung ROM.
What difference between Spotify and Melon version?
- Spotify version has Spotify tab, it commonly used for global region Samsung devices
- Melon version has Melon in bottom tab, used for Korean devices
- Melon version has some UI changes, like search button will be in bottom tab instead of search button
- Both are same, but you need install one of mentioned apps (Spotify or Melon from playstore) to use their services

item.title: Setup Installer Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Setup Installer Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
Setup Installer Software
(Utilities)
Setup maker software creates complete professional looking installer program in just few mouse clicks. Application setup installer software builds single self extracting executable file for users like software developers, programmers and coders who frequently face problems in creating setup installation package. Setup installer package wizard has both install as well as uninstall set up generating features. Customized setup install builder program is easy, safe, fast and reliable setup creator utility which creates single self extracting executable exe setup file in just few mouse clicks. Best setup generator utility enables to develop executable setup wizard with several setup customization options such as product name, version, agreement text, copyright text, installation folder & company name. Windows installer maker program shows the entire details of software program including General information, Destination path, Dialogs, Files addition, Registry Details and also creates the shortcut of your products. Single setup creator software maintains the originality of your software while creating software setup. Setup maker tool provides user friendly Graphical User Interface and is compatible with all major versions of Windows Operating System including Windows 11, Win 10, Win 8. Features: * Easy to use, flexible, fast and reliable setup installer software. * Facilitates both install and uninstall features for your windows application software. * Provides interactive Graphical User Interface which requires no technical skills to operate. * Saves the details of your program such as General information, Registry, Dialogs & Destination details while creating software setup. * Software is compatible with all major versions of Windows OS.

[read more]

item.title: SIM card Contacts Rescue Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM card Contacts Rescue Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
SIM card Contacts Rescue Software
(Utilities)
How to recover all erased or deleted inbox, outbox, draft and sent items messages with date and time, contact number and phone book directory from corrupted or logically crashed any 5G / GSM mobile SIM card? Blocked SIM card data retrieval software provide backup of lost or missing valuable contact name along with number, fixed dialed number, last dialed number, SMS messages from cell phone SIM card. Locked mobile SIM card data rescue tool salvage SIM card information with the help of any PC/SC standards SIM card reader or phoenix standards based SIM card reader. SIM card contacts recovery utility easily works with all Microsoft Windows operating system including windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7. USB SIM card reader tool provides inbuilt step by step help manual that facilitate persons to reclaim or undelete text messages and other valuable information. GSM mobile SIM card recovery software generates and save text report for future use. 5G compatible SIM card rescue program simply and easily understandable by non-technical as well as technical users. SIM card information backup device restore lost or erased ICC identification number, service provider name, network location, IMSI number in very less time.Features:*SIM card information reader software provides interactive user friendly graphical user interface (GUI) that helps those users who wants to recover deleted mobile SIM card data.*Cell phone SIM card data recovery tool does not require any special technical knowledge to use the software.*5G compatible SIM card retrieval application restores accidentally corrupted or deleted phone book memory and erased contact number.*Free SIM card data salvage trial tool is easily read SIM card of any country with any network.

[read more]

EA Sports FC Mobile Beta APK 20.9.07 Free Download Mobile
(Various Games)
Prepare to embark on a thrilling journey into the world of soccer gaming with the highly anticipated release of EA Sports FC Mobile Beta APK 20.9.07. Developed by EA Sports, a titan in the gaming industry renowned for its groundbreaking titles, this beta version promises to redefine the mobile gaming landscape with its innovative features and immersive gameplay experience.EA Sports FC Mobile Beta APK 20.9.07 sets itself apart with its unparalleled gameplay experience. From the moment you step onto the virtual pitch, you'll be captivated by the fluid player movements, realistic ball physics, and dynamic gameplay mechanics. Whether you're executing precision passes, performing skillful dribbles, or unleashing powerful shots, every moment feels like a true representation of the beautiful game.

item.title: Windows Data Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Windows Data Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
Windows Data Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Windows FAT, NTFS partition file system data recovery software retrieve and repair corrupted file formats like JPG, JPEG, MOV, WAV, GIF, RIFF, TIFF, PSD, AVI, TIF, PNG, BMP, 3gp, MPEG, XLS, PPT, DOC, HTML, TXT and other related data. Tool provides best recovery solution to recover and fix your lost data like audio video music files, pictures, images, and credential documents from your hard drives. You can easily recover deleted data yourself using this non-destructive windows partition data restoration utility. Software can repair your all deleted files and folder from hard disks and restore them to safe and desired partition of laptop, desktop or notebook computer. Windows partition file system recovery software supports all type of hard drives including SATA, PATA, EIDE, IDE, ATA, SCSI etc. Windows data rescue software provides data restoration support on various windows operating system like Windows 11, Win 10, Win 8. There is no need of any technical knowledge to use this software. Windows data recovery software recovers all type of lost or formatted files folders information even hard disk partition has been recreated or data has been deleted using Shift + Del keys. Features: * Utility has user friendly and highly attractive graphical user interface (GUI). * Windows partition data recovery tool retrieve lost data even after partition has been recreated. * Technical as well as non technical person can easily recover its lost or erased data by this windows partition data restoration software. * Software easily recovers data from formatted, corrupted or virus infected FAT or NTFS partition based hard disk drive. * Data recovery tool recover data from permanently erased recycle bin.

[read more]
item.description:
Windows Data Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Windows FAT, NTFS partition file system data recovery software retrieve and repair corrupted file formats like JPG, JPEG, MOV, WAV, GIF, RIFF, TIFF, PSD, AVI, TIF, PNG, BMP, 3gp, MPEG, XLS, PPT, DOC, HTML, TXT and other related data. item.title: Setup Builder Software [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Setup Builder Software [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
Setup Builder Software
(Developers Apps)
Setup installer builder software allow user to insert all registry information including root key, sub key name, sub key value and registry type in exe creation process by software. Self extractor builder tool is reliable and cost effective utility create or develop single self extracting installation file of your windows application program. Setup generator software is powerful and affordable tool that provide complete uninstall and install facility for your software program. Professional setup installation maker utility facilitates user to add license agreement, product name, version, title, company name, dialog box, registry entries, shortcut path and icon. Windows setup creator software takes less time and memory space to install and facilitate to distribute software program over web or via removable storage media. Executable file builder software combines all information into single self extracting installation package or file with all basic features like registry details, copyright agreement, dialogs box, shortcut, icons and destination path of your product. Setup maker tool is compatible with all Microsoft Windows operating system including windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:*Executable file generator utilities help you to produce a customized setup of your windows application program.*Professional setup installer tool easily understandable by non technical person without any technical or programming skill required.*Self extractor builder application is useful for software programmer, coder, developer or any other professional to develop setup package.*Setup generator software allow user to install or uninstall windows program as per user choice.*Setup builder program provide attractive user friendly graphical user interface and maintain original structure of windows program.

[read more]
item.description:
Setup Builder Software
(Developers Apps)
Setup installer builder software allow user to insert all registry information including root key, sub key name, sub key value and registry type in exe creation process by software. Self extractor builder tool is reliable and cost effective utility create or develop single self extracting installation file of your windows application program. Setup generator software is powerful and affordable tool that provide complete uninstall and install facility for your software program. item.title: -png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for KDE44 and Plasma [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: -png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for KDE44 and Plasma [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: Blackcrack
item.itunes:summary:
-png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for KDE44 and Plasma
(Developers Apps)
2024.05.02-09-00 update the code
2024.04.16-14-31 update the code


The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and there have i search for a png2svg.sh, i did not know to be a png moved into a svg..
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg .. at first/at the codingstart...
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)

Also the whole configuration of the Script is into the head of the Single Script,
also Rename of the Script is possible because it's all based on $0 !

* also be sub-folder "svg" for fully build up real "svg"-Pictures be possible now in the "svg"-Subfolder in the Source-sub-folder's
what is overcopy the png-svg behind the 1st "moveinsvg-routine" and put/copy all the svg's in the "working" Theme folder and overwrite the "old files,
this helps to check, if all SVG are complet ... also exist a possible for compile all for let check the "themefolder" before you let compress and finishing the themepackage, also it is possible if you sure to be all fixed , can you push it via "makeall" include compressing theme package, check out --help or /? of the script,
Also with "soft links" can you now working, as example to save picture-space in Size, as example *-symbolic.svg or some in svg-folder can you set up a softlink and it will copy it to the Product-folder also as link
and it is adjustable in the Configuration in the head of the Script "cplnsvg=yes" so, "copy the linked svg" 's, if 0 or no, will copy the fully picture and make therewith real svg's out of the copy of the linked file and make all more bigger in size at end.. (thy for the info Nate in your Blog ( https://pointieststick.com/feed/ ) super suggestion to use softlinks ! )

All is description in the help. So, have fun and happy Theme creating include SVG-files as 2nd over copy step !!

So can you make now a fully real SVG-Picture Theme .. (and not only a png-copy-in svgfiles)

also exist 8x8, 16x16, 22x22, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 96x96, 128x128, 256x256, 512x512,8x8@2, 16x16@2, 22x22@2, 32x32@2,48x48@2
real folder support in the "endproduct-folder" for put special pictures in each single folder and will also not overwrite and not deleted,
because be real Folders and no more links if you create one of these folders for special pictures in these resolutions ..


Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
item.description:
-png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for KDE44 and Plasma
(Developers Apps)
2024.05.02-09-00 update the code
2024.04.16-14-31 update the code


The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and there have i search for a png2svg.sh, i did not know to be a png moved into a svg..
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg .. at first/at the codingstart...
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)

Also the whole configuration of the Script is into the head of the Single Script,
also Rename of the Script is possible because it's all based on $0 !

* also be sub-folder "svg" for fully build up real "svg"-Pictures be possible now in the "svg"-Subfolder in the Source-sub-folder's
what is overcopy the png-svg behind the 1st "moveinsvg-routine" and put/copy all the svg's in the "working" Theme folder and overwrite the "old files,
this helps to check, if all SVG are complet ... also exist a possible for compile all for let check the "themefolder" before you let compress and finishing the themepackage, also it is possible if you sure to be all fixed , can you push it via "makeall" include compressing theme package, check out --help or /? of the script,
Also with "soft links" can you now working, as example to save picture-space in Size, as example *-symbolic.svg or some in svg-folder can you set up a softlink and it will copy it to the Product-folder also as link
and it is adjustable in the Configuration in the head of the Script "cplnsvg=yes" so, "copy the linked svg" 's, if 0 or no, will copy the fully picture and make therewith real svg's out of the copy of the linked file and make all more bigger in size at end.. (thy for the info Nate in your Blog ( https://pointieststick.com/feed/ ) super suggestion to use softlinks ! )

All is description in the help. So, have fun and happy Theme creating include SVG-files as 2nd over copy step !!

So can you make now a fully real SVG-Picture Theme .. (and not only a png-copy-in svgfiles)

also exist 8x8, 16x16, 22x22, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 96x96, 128x128, 256x256, 512x512,8x8@2, 16x16@2, 22x22@2, 32x32@2,48x48@2
real folder support in the "endproduct-folder" for put special pictures in each single folder and will also not overwrite and not deleted,
because be real Folders and no more links if you create one of these folders for special pictures in these resolutions ..


Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
-png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for KDE44 and Plasma
(Developers Apps)
2024.05.02-09-00 update the code
2024.04.16-14-31 update the code


The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and there have i search for a png2svg.sh, i did not know to be a png moved into a svg..
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg .. at first/at the codingstart...
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)

Also the whole configuration of the Script is into the head of the Single Script,
also Rename of the Script is possible because it's all based on $0 !

* also be sub-folder "svg" for fully build up real "svg"-Pictures be possible now in the "svg"-Subfolder in the Source-sub-folder's
what is overcopy the png-svg behind the 1st "moveinsvg-routine" and put/copy all the svg's in the "working" Theme folder and overwrite the "old files,
this helps to check, if all SVG are complet ... also exist a possible for compile all for let check the "themefolder" before you let compress and finishing the themepackage, also it is possible if you sure to be all fixed , can you push it via "makeall" include compressing theme package, check out --help or /? of the script,
Also with "soft links" can you now working, as example to save picture-space in Size, as example *-symbolic.svg or some in svg-folder can you set up a softlink and it will copy it to the Product-folder also as link
and it is adjustable in the Configuration in the head of the Script "cplnsvg=yes" so, "copy the linked svg" 's, if 0 or no, will copy the fully picture and make therewith real svg's out of the copy of the linked file and make all more bigger in size at end.. (thy for the info Nate in your Blog ( https://pointieststick.com/feed/ ) super suggestion to use softlinks ! )

All is description in the help. So, have fun and happy Theme creating include SVG-files as 2nd over copy step !!

So can you make now a fully real SVG-Picture Theme .. (and not only a png-copy-in svgfiles)

also exist 8x8, 16x16, 22x22, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 96x96, 128x128, 256x256, 512x512,8x8@2, 16x16@2, 22x22@2, 32x32@2,48x48@2
real folder support in the "endproduct-folder" for put special pictures in each single folder and will also not overwrite and not deleted,
because be real Folders and no more links if you create one of these folders for special pictures in these resolutions ..


Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
